# UNTP official samples (v0.7.0)

JSON files under `v0.7.0/dcc/` and `v0.7.0/dia/` are copied from [untp.unece.org](https://untp.unece.org/) sample artefacts:

- DCC: [Conformity Credential specification — sample instances](https://untp.unece.org/docs/specification/ConformityCredential#artifacts)
- DIA: [Digital Identity Anchor specification — sample instances](https://untp.unece.org/docs/specification/DigitalIdentityAnchor#artifacts)

**Update:** re-download from the same `artefacts/samples/v0.7.0/...` URLs if the spec publishes new revisions.
